title: What if your Twitter ran itself while you built your product
excerpt: Monday morning. You haven't posted in 4 days. You open TweetGenie. 7 tweets already generated, scheduled, ready.
content:
Monday morning. You haven't posted in 4 days. You open TweetGenie. 7 tweets already generated, scheduled, ready. Based on your actual account data. Tailored to what's trending in your niche. At the times your audience is most active.

You approve in 2 minutes or turn on autopilot and don't even do that.

## The Monday Morning Content Panic

Founders and solo creators know the pain. You should post more, but there's no time.

## How Strategy Analysis Works for a Creator

We analyze your account to learn your voice, your topics, and your top hits.

## Weekly Generation Flow

Every Monday, an entire week of content is waiting for you. Just approve, edit, or reject.

## Autopilot Option 

Turn it on and let the system post. You have a 1-hour window to undo before it goes live.

[Try TweetGenie free](/register)

seo.metaDescription: What if your Twitter ran itself while you built your product?
